title: Create item on two separate boards
excerpt: I am using a form to create an item on separate boards . I would like an item to be created on any of my team members board according to the “Status” that is selected on the form. How can I do this?

posts.author: Casexton3 (Aaron Sexton)
posts.cookedHtml: I am using a form to create an item on separate boards . I would like an item to be created on any of my team members board according to the “Status” that is selected on the form. How can I do this?

posts.author: lauralev (Laura Levy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Casexton3! At the moment our crossboard automations are not supported by form input however, you could still set up this recipe and trigger it manually by changing its status:

image718×222 11.7 KB

Our team is working on supporting crossboard automations for form support! Let me know if this would work for you! Cheers!
